title: From swimmer to Apple’s next CEO: 7 facts about John Ternus, Tim Cook’s likely successor
snippet: John Ternus, Apple’s hardware chief, has quietly risen through the ranks to become a top CEO contender. From his early work in virtual reality to leading Apple’s key product lines, his journey reflects the company’s engineering-driven culture and long-term leadership planning.

title: Apple CEOs: From Michael Scott and Steve Jobs to Tim Cook and John Ternus — how they shaped the company
snippet: Apple is set for a leadership change as Tim Cook steps down in September, with John Ternus taking over. From its founding by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak to today, here’s a look at the CEOs who have shaped the company’s growth and influence over 50 years.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Tim Cook on stepping down as Apple CEO: ‘Incredible run’
snippet: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple's CEO, transitioning to executive chairman. John Ternus will succeed him on 1 September, overseeing hardware engineering.&nbsp;
